name: brand_mention_with_owned_and_third_party_citations
answer: For mid-market teams, Acme Cloud is often compared with Globex Suite. Sources include https://www.acme.com/customers and https://research.example.org/cloud-buyers-guide.

name: competitor_only_answer
answer: Globex Suite and Contoso Ops are common recommendations. The answer cites https://globex.com/guide and https://contoso.example/case-study.

name: substring_false_positive_guard
answer: Acmeology Labs is a different company and should not count as Acme. Source: https://acmeology.example/about.

name: diacritic_brand_answer
answer: Café Nova is mentioned in local retail comparisons, with supporting pages at https://cafenova.example/reviews.
